overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling downtown intersection resembling Times Square, with heavy traffic and pedestrians moving below. Static third-person camera view captures the urban canyon with towering glass buildings and vibrant digital billboards. High-quality game engine footage from Marvel's Spider-Man.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking busy downtown intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on a building ledge, surveying the busy street and intersection below

entered.detail: Tall modern glass building facade rising immediately beside the ledge
Tall glass tower with multiple large digital billboards and advertisements
Large red digital billboard and surrounding advertisement screens visible down the street canyon
Concrete building ledge where Spider-Man is perched, overlooking the street below

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man sits perched on a high-rise building ledge between two glass skyscrapers, overlooking a dense urban intersection. The camera remains static, capturing the bustling street below with heavy traffic flow and scattered pedestrians. Bright midday sunlight illuminates the modern glass architecture and vivid digital billboards lining the street canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, high-angle perspective that captures the immense scale of a sun-drenched urban canyon. It begins with Spider-Man perched precariously on a high-rise building ledge, framed between two towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera holds its position, the view expands downward to reveal a dense intersection teeming with the rhythmic flow of heavy traffic and scattered pedestrians. The scene is defined by the interplay of bright midday sunlight reflecting off modern architecture and the vivid glow of digital billboards lining the street below.
